articles.title: Heavy to very heavy rainfall and heatwave warning issued for several states, list released | To read the entire bulletin issued by IMD | Inshorts - Inshorts
articles.full_text:
Heavy to very heavy rainfall and heatwave warning issued for several states, list released
The IMD has issued rainfall and heatwave warning for several states/UTs for Tuesday. Heavy to very heavy rainfall is likely over Bihar, Odisha, Arunachal Pradesh, Assam, Meghalaya, Chhattisgarh, Jharkhand, Nagaland, Manipur, Mizoram, Tripura, Sikkim and West Bengal. Heatwave is very likely over Andhra Pradesh. Further, hot and humid weather is likely over Odisha, Tamil Nadu and Puducherry.
